Freshness_Expectation: Current declaration only; insufficient for high confidence
Exception: Only for routing/profile or low-risk initial screen

Freshness_Expectation: Current or still approved; recent implementation records needed if older than 24 months
Conflict_Rule: Document loses to operational records where inconsistent
Confidence_Explanation_Trigger: Document age or missing approval affects confidence
Exception: Long-term policy accepted if supported by recent records

Freshness_Expectation: Should cover assessment period; gaps >3 months flagged for periodic data
Confidence_Explanation_Trigger: Missing periods or inconsistent records reduce confidence
Exception: Seasonal operations require appropriate period note

Freshness_Expectation: Current validity or within required monitoring period; generally <=12-24 months for performance evidence
Exception: Long-valid permits need recent condition tracking

Freshness_Expectation: Verification must specify scope, period, and methodology; <=24 months preferred
Conflict_Rule: Verified evidence overrides internal non-verified evidence if scopes match
Confidence_Explanation_Trigger: Scope mismatch or old verification requires explanation
Exception: Older verification may support baseline only
